name: Beans Rice Squash
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Vidalia (yellow) onion, diced and sautéed (caramelized)
3 slices acorn squash, cooked and diced small (1 cup or more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat up the kidney beans.
2. Mash the beans with their liquid.
3. Mix the spices, tomato, and sautéed onion together and heat for 2 minutes.
4. Combine the rice with the mashed beans and add the onion/tomato mixture.
5. Simmer for 2 minutes and then add the diced acorn squash.
6. Serve 2 portions.
This dish has a robust flavor profile, combining sweet, spicy, and slightly tangy notes from the tomato. Optional additions like capers (1 tablespoon per cup) can provide a green, juicy contrast. The use of tomato in this recipe may be unconventional but offers an interesting flavor balance.
